hyperedges.description: Todos los templates CRUD usan el mismo modal #modalConfirmDelete y funciones globales confirmDelete()/submitFormWithConfirm() de base.html para estandarizar confirmaciones destructivas con detalle de impacto.
Los cuatro templates admin comparten: tabla + modal creacion + modal edicion + barra busqueda/filtro + form_state/field_errors para validacion inline con preservacion de captura.
Al cerrar una sesion de mejora: rm_checklist requiere actualizar ver_current en VERSIONES.md y agregar entrada en ver_changelog, formando el protocolo obligatorio de cierre.

nodes.label: Catálogo Data Structure
nodes.rationale: Global reusable item registry independent of projects; serves as source for LDMs and COTs. ID generated by app (8-char hex). Prices can be zero (labor or unknown). Items linked to COT/LDM by catalog_item_id.

nodes.label: Lista de Materiales (LDM) Data Structure
nodes.rationale: Per-project material lists sent to suppliers. Does not include sale prices. Legacy format LDM-{clave}-{MMDD}-{seq} coexists with current LDM-{clave}-{seq:02d}.

nodes.label: Cotización al Cliente (COT) Data Structure
nodes.rationale: Client-facing sales quotations with IVA. Quote number auto-generated as COT-{clave}-{G/P/E}{NN}-{YYYYMMDD}. Three types: General(G), Preliminar(P), Extraordinaria(E) with independent sequential counters.

nodes.label: CSV Import API Routes (Pending)
nodes.rationale: POST /api/import/catalogo, /api/import/ldm, /api/import/cotizacion are pending implementation. Current APIs support single-item add, search, and bulk-delete on catalog.

nodes.label: AutoCAD/LISP to App Workflow
nodes.rationale: LISP reads drawing, exports three CSV types (catalog, LDM, COT), app imports and assigns IDs, user reviews prices, generates PDFs for supplier and client.

nodes.label: ProjectTracker System Rationale
nodes.rationale: Local Flask app persisting JSON, no database, no internet. Design principles: full traceability from COT item to catalog to drawing; no duplication (one CSV per LDM); controlled changes via diff; scalable by discipline and project.

nodes.label: CSV de Plano (AutoCAD Export) Entity
nodes.rationale: Filename pattern {CLAVE}-v{VER}-i{CONSEC}-{YYYYMMDD}.csv mandatory for app detection. Parser in drive.py:parse_csv_plano_filename. States: Pendiente/Actualización/Importado/Desactualizado tracked by decorate_csv_plano().

nodes.label: Proyecto Entity
nodes.rationale: Central entity linking all other entities. folder_num auto-incremental NNN; Drive folder IE-{folder_num:03d}-{clave}. Alcances track engineering scope completion with blocking dependencies.

nodes.label: CSV→LDM Import Diff Algorithm
nodes.rationale: Design for comparing old vs new CSV vs current LDM: Sin cambio/Actualizar/Revisar/Nuevo/Retirado actions. qty_editada flag tracks manual user modifications, preventing automated overwrite of manually adjusted quantities.

nodes.label: Data Integrity Rules (R1-R7)
nodes.rationale: R1: One CSV per LDM. R2: qty_csv immutable after import. R3: manual rows invisible to diff. R4: no automatic row deletion. R5: LDM needs at least one row for PDF. R6: COT number sequential per type. R7: valid currencies MXN/USD/EUR.

nodes.label: scan_drive_folder Function
nodes.rationale: Classifies drive files by prefix priority: csv_plano > ldm_files > cot_files > mem_files > ie_files > work_files > other_files. Decorates IE/MEM with highlight=True for most recent version.

nodes.label: Catalog Hydration Logic
nodes.rationale: catalog_maps() builds by_id and by_name dicts. resolve_catalog_binding() tries exact ID first, then normalized name. hydrate_quote/ldm adds catalog_linked, catalog_missing, calculates totals, groups items by section.

nodes.label: Quote Sections Feature
nodes.rationale: Optional section grouping per item in COT. Items with same consecutive section value are grouped with subtotal. quote_section_groups() generates the structure. Rendered in form, view, and PDF.

nodes.label: APP_VERSION Constant
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth in tracker/domain.py. Injected to all templates via context processor in tracker/__init__.py. Versioning convention: decimal increments for UI/aesthetic changes, integer increments for new features.

nodes.label: Flask Blueprints Architecture
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: Refactored from monolithic app.py into blueprints: projects_bp, quotes_bp, materials_bp, admin_bp. Legacy endpoint aliases registered in __init__.py to keep templates working.

nodes.label: Consistency COT vs LDM Module
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: compute_consistency() selects most recent General COT, aggregates by catalog_item_id across all LDMs, computes margin % with ok/warning/critical thresholds at 30%/0%. Detects issues: missing_in_ldm, missing_in_cot, qty_mismatch, below_cost.

nodes.label: Bundles Versioned System
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: Manual versioned bundles that expand a commercial COT item into expected materials. comparison_rules define equivalence factors between COT and LDM items. comparison_ignored_items excludes items from cross-check while keeping them in project costs.

nodes.label: Deleted Catalog Audit System
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: When catalog items are deleted, deleted_catalog_item snapshot preserved in COT/LDM items. Three-action flow: preserve (keep reference), reconnect (link to new item), purge (remove permanently). Dedicated audit page /audit/deleted-catalog.

nodes.label: Drive Integration (Multiplataforma)
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: config.json stores separate paths per OS (Windows/macOS/Linux). scan_drive_folder distinguishes error types: unconfigured/root_missing/folder_missing. Detects missing_base files. create_project_folder() auto-creates from UI.

nodes.label: Pending: Bundle Technical Consistency Audit
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: Improve bundle technical consistency view: expected vs actual materials table, highlight missing/excess/qty-diff, bundles without active version, components without comparison rule.

nodes.label: Pending: Destructive Action Confirmations
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: Standardize confirmation dialogs showing impact before executing: delete COT, LDM, delivery, ficha, proveedor, team member, purge deleted catalog items, delete catalog items with existing references.

nodes.label: JSON Data Files (data/)
nodes.source_location: projects.json, tasks.json, quotes.json, materiales.json, catalogo.json, proveedores.json, fichas.json, config.json, bundles.json, comparison_rules.json

nodes.label: CSV Plano Filename Convention
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: Pattern {CLAVE}-v{VER}-i{CONSEC}-{FECHA}.csv is mandatory for auto-detection. Content accepts description,unit,qty or descripcion,unidad,cantidad headers. Optional metadata rows: #proveedor, #fecha, #proyecto_clave.

nodes.label: Drive Project Folder Naming
nodes.source_location: Convenciones de nomenclatura - Carpeta del proyecto
nodes.author: Ricardo Flores Rivera
nodes.rationale: IE-{folder_num}-{clave} pattern. folder_num is auto-incremental 3-digit NNN assigned at project creation. All deliverable files live flat in this folder (no subfolders).

nodes.label: Quote Sectioned Line Items Pattern
nodes.rationale: Sections allow grouping quote line items (partidas) with per-section subtotals, enabling structured breakdowns for complex projects. Items belong to a section via a hidden field that is synced on drag-and-drop reorder and on form submit.

nodes.label: Quote Bulk Row Selection & Actions Pattern
nodes.rationale: Multi-select checkboxes on quote rows with a floating action toolbar allow users to move, copy, or delete many rows at once without repeated single-row operations.
nodes.norm_label: quote bulk row selection & actions pattern

nodes.label: Inline Catalog Autocomplete Pattern
nodes.rationale: Typing in any item description field fires a debounced /api/catalogo query and shows a dropdown (ac-dropdown). This avoids a full page reload to link items to the catalog and reduces data entry errors.

nodes.label: Deleted Catalog Item Handling Pattern
nodes.rationale: When a catalog item referenced by a quote/LDM row is deleted, the row is highlighted and offers three actions: preserve historically (keep reference but mark resolved), reconnect (link to a new catalog item), or purge (remove the row). Snapshot data of the deleted item is stored as hidden fields to maintain traceability.

nodes.label: Drag-and-Drop Row Reorder Pattern
nodes.rationale: Mouse-based drag handles on table rows allow reordering quote and LDM line items without requiring numbered inputs. After drop, syncItemSections() updates hidden section fields to reflect new positions.

nodes.label: Fixed Bottom Summary Bar Pattern
nodes.rationale: A position:fixed bottom bar shows live subtotal, IVA, and total while the user scrolls through a long items table, preventing the need to scroll up to see totals.

nodes.label: Sticky Table Header with Dynamic Offset Pattern
nodes.rationale: syncStickyItemsOffsets() reads the topbar and card header heights at runtime and sets CSS variables (--sticky-items-toolbar-top, --sticky-items-head-top) so that sticky thead and card-header do not overlap the fixed topbar at any window size.
nodes.norm_label: sticky table header with dynamic offset pattern

nodes.label: Client-side Partida Filter Pattern
nodes.rationale: Rows are hidden/shown in-place (display:none) rather than removed from the DOM so the form still submits all items on save regardless of filter state.

nodes.label: Auto-generated Quote Number Pattern
nodes.rationale: The server pre-computes base numbers (NUM_G, NUM_P, NUM_E) per quote type. Changing the date or type in the form updates the number field client-side by substituting the 8-digit date portion. A userEditedNum flag prevents auto-update after manual edits.

nodes.label: LDM (Lista de Materiales) Entity
nodes.rationale: LDMs are material request lists sent to suppliers, intentionally without pricing (the supplier fills prices). They are linked to a project and a specific supplier.

nodes.label: LDM CSV Import Preview Mode
nodes.rationale: When is_import_preview is true, the form shows which items were auto-linked to catalog entries and which need manual linking, before the LDM is permanently created.

nodes.label: Catalog Inline AJAX Edit Pattern
nodes.rationale: Catalog edits POST to /catalogo/{id}/edit with X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest and receive JSON, then update the DOM row in-place without page reload. Delete also uses AJAX and shows a warning if the deleted item has references in quotes or LDMs.

nodes.label: Bundle Entity (COT Commercial Item + LDM Components)
nodes.rationale: A bundle maps one commercial quote item (COT) to multiple expected LDM material items with quantities and waste percentages, enabling technical consistency checks. Bundles have versioned component lists; only one version can be active at a time to participate in consistency analysis.
nodes.norm_label: bundle entity (cot commercial item + ldm components)

nodes.label: COT/LDM Comparison Rule Entity
nodes.rationale: Comparison rules handle cross-unit equivalences between COT and LDM items (e.g., tubing in ml on COT vs pieces on LDM). They define a factor, direction (LDM->COT or COT->LDM), rounding mode, and tolerance percentage.

nodes.label: Comparison Ignored Item Entity
nodes.rationale: Items marked as ignored still count toward project cost but are excluded from COT/LDM discrepancy checking. Scope can be commercial-only, technical-only, or both.

nodes.label: Google Drive Integration Settings
nodes.rationale: Drive paths are stored per OS (Windows/macOS) so the same shared folder can be accessed from different machines without configuration conflicts.

nodes.label: Roadmap de Mejoras (Backlog)
nodes.rationale: Centraliza el backlog de mejoras acordadas para retomar en futuras sesiones; separa completado de pendiente para trazabilidad de decisiones de arquitectura.

nodes.label: Sincronizacion Parcial COT-Bundle-LDM (Diseno Pendiente)
nodes.rationale: Pregunta de arquitectura de datos abierta: si el sistema debe auto-rellenar LDM desde expansion de bundle o propagar cambios COT a multiplicadores antes de implementar UI.

nodes.label: Convencion de Versionado
nodes.rationale: Version mayor para features nuevas (entero), menor para parches (decimal). Fuente unica en tracker/domain.py APP_VERSION inyectada via context processor.

nodes.label: Stack Tecnico Python 3.14 Flask 3+ fpdf2 openpyxl
nodes.norm_label: stack tecnico python 3.14 flask 3+ fpdf2 openpyxl

links.source_location: Both handle reviewing and reconciling discrepancies in tracked items

hyperedges.description: Todos los templates CRUD usan el mismo modal #modalConfirmDelete y funciones globales confirmDelete()/submitFormWithConfirm() de base.html para estandarizar confirmaciones destructivas con detalle de impacto.
Los cuatro templates admin comparten: tabla + modal creacion + modal edicion + barra busqueda/filtro + form_state/field_errors para validacion inline con preservacion de captura.
Al cerrar una sesion de mejora: rm_checklist requiere actualizar ver_current en VERSIONES.md y agregar entrada en ver_changelog, formando el protocolo obligatorio de cierre.
